introSection: Cho-Cho Car (Chinese: 巧巧云霄车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gingko Lake Amusement Park in Jiangning, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. The coaster originally opened at Kurashiki Tivoli Park in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan as Tivoli Railroad (Japanese: チボリ鉄道).

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Orange track and cyan supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an steam engine. It used to feature a Danish and Japanese flag on the front of the train when it operated at Kurashiki Tivoli Park.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Cho-Cho Car on the park's website (in Chinese)

fullText:
Cho-Cho Car (Chinese: 巧巧云霄车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gingko Lake Amusement Park in Jiangning, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. The coaster originally opened at Kurashiki Tivoli Park in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan as Tivoli Railroad (Japanese: チボリ鉄道).



Orange track and cyan supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble an steam engine. It used to feature a Danish and Japanese flag on the front of the train when it operated at Kurashiki Tivoli Park.


 * Cho-Cho Car on the park's website (in Chinese)
